expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves Google Sheets export entry points, scope boundaries, and format constraints before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the output lists the required items (entry points, scope boundaries, format constraints) but explicitly marks each as "Not determinable from provided evidence" and summarizes them as "Unknown". It also states: "No customer-issue evidence was provided... Cannot extract feature-specific facts..." Therefore the context is not actually preserved (frozen) for those elements.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled "Phase 1 (Context Intake)", includes a "Context Preservation Checklist" and "Context Intake Summary", and explicitly enforces the phase boundary: "No scenario drafting, test cases, or step-by-step validations are produced here, per phase1 contract." This aligns with phase1.
